title: ranunculus aquatilis var. circinatus
intro: Ranunculus aquatilis var. circinatus, also known as the circular-leafed water-crowfoot, is a floating aquatic plant that belongs to the Ranunculaceae family. Its medicinal properties lie in its ability to inhibit inflammation and act as an anticoagulant, making it useful in treating conditions such as varicose veins and hemorrhoids. The health benefits of Ranunculus aquatilis var. circinatus include reducing swelling, improving blood circulation, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Traditional herbal preparations involve the plant's leaves and stems being dried and used in infusions, tinctures, and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
